name: Pixel Room renders the companion pet and today's missions
description: The Pixel Room shows the user's companion as a rendered animated sprite (not a broken-image placeholder), a pet mood/status label, and a Today's Missions list with at least one mission and its progress.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Pixel Room link in the sidebar

Verify the page displays a companion pet sprite image that has actually rendered with visible pixels (not a broken-image icon or empty box), accompanied by a pet name and a mood/status label such as Happy, Neutral, or Sad

Verify a Today's Missions section is present listing at least one mission item, and each mission shows a progress indicator (a count like '2 / 20' or a progress bar), confirming the missions area populated with real data rather than an empty heading
